<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The next cell in front (row 02 column C) has lava (`L`), so moving forward is dangerous. I should turn downwards to head towards the goal at row 04 column D, which is to my bottom right. Turning clockwise will make me face down (`v`).
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B and facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward will take me into lava at row 03 column B. I need to avoid lava. There is a safe floor cell at row 02 column D. To reach it, I must turn left to face right (`>`). To change orientation from down (`v`) to right (`>`), I need to rotate 90 degrees clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B facing left (`<`). The goal is at row 04 column D. To proceed safely, I need to face down (`v`) to move forward into row 03 column B which is a safe floor cell. To turn from left `<` to down `v`, I will rotate clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B and I am facing up (`^`). The goal is at row 04 column D. If I move forward, I will hit a wall, so I need to turn. To progress toward the goal, I should turn clockwise to face right (`>`), so I can move toward the open floor and avoid lava.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>

<action>
GIRA_HORARIO

<thought>

<action>
FRENTE
